request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for defense, but are we getting the support we need in return? Recent reports show that while we're spending billions on mutual defense, some allies are cutting their own budgets. It's time to ask: are we being taken advantage of? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
